meta.title: KurgemX — AI-Powered Business Analysis Platform
meta.description: Generate story maps, business analysis documents and prototypes with AI. Built for business analysts and project managers.
meta.keywords: AI business analysis, story map generator, user story mapping, business analyst tool

hero.title: AI-Powered Business Analysis Platform
hero.subtitle: Generate story maps, business analysis documents and prototypes with AI in minutes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your project name and a brief description. AI will expand it into a detailed project overview.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI creates a complete story map with epics, user stories, sprints, and release planning.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Export your story map to Excel, share with your team, and start building.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.storyMapDesc: Automatically generate comprehensive story maps with R1/R2/R3 release planning.
features.bizAnalysisDesc: Generate R1, R2, R3 business analysis documents aligned with your story map.
features.prototypeDesc: Create interactive prototypes from your user stories.
features.testScenariosDesc: Generate detailed test scenarios for every user story.
features.exportDesc: Export story maps, documents and test scenarios in standard formats.
features.multilangDesc: Work in Turkish or English — AI generates content in your project language.
